note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 0.5 cm x 0.6 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 63% slough, 37% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Alginate dressing applied.
Wound note - Rightlowerex. Meas 0.5x0.6x0.5cm. Light serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 39% gran, 61% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Patel notified.
